mapper.sql: select a.id, a.application_no, a.application_type, a.purchasing_plan_id, a.replenishment_id, a.applicant_id, a.applicant_date, a.applicant_status, a.approved_id, a.approved_date, a.approved_status, a.approved_comments, a.remark, c.document_number, f.user_name applicant_name, g.user_name approved_name, d.document_number as replenishment_number from scm_purchasing_appliction a
mapper.select: select a.id, a.application_no, a.application_type, a.purchasing_plan_id, a.replenishment_id, a.applicant_id, a.applicant_date, a.applicant_status, a.approved_id, a.approved_date, a.approved_status, a.approved_comments, a.remark, b.id as sub_id, b.purchasing_application_id as sub_purchasing_application_id, b.material_id as sub_material_id, b.purchase_quantity as sub_purchase_quantity, b.demanded_quantity as sub_demanded_quantity, b.demanded_date as sub_demanded_date, b.remark as sub_remark, c.document_number, d.document_number as replenishment_number, f.user_name applicant_name, g.user_name approved_name, e.material_name, e.material_model, e.material_specifications, e.material_unit from scm_purchasing_appliction a left join scm_purchasing_appliction_detail b on b.purchasing_application_id = a.id LEFT JOIN scm_purchasing_plan c on a.purchasing_plan_id = c.id LEFT JOIN wms_replenishment_application d on a.replenishment_id = d.id left join wms_material e on b.material_id = e.id left JOIN sys_user f ON a.applicant_id = f.user_id left JOIN sys_user g ON a.approved_id = g.user_id where a.id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
insert into scm_purchasing_appliction
application_no, application_type, purchasing_plan_id, replenishment_id, applicant_id, applicant_date, applicant_status, approved_id, approved_date, approved_status, approved_comments, remark,
#{applicationNo}, #{applicationType}, #{purchasingPlanId}, #{replenishmentId}, #{applicantId}, #{applicantDate}, #{applicantStatus}, #{approvedId}, #{approvedDate}, #{approvedStatus}, #{approvedComments}, #{remark},
mapper.delete:
delete from scm_purchasing_appliction where id in
#{id}

delete from scm_purchasing_appliction_detail where purchasing_application_id in
#{purchasingApplicationId}
mapper.insert:
insert into scm_purchasing_appliction_detail( id, purchasing_application_id, material_id, purchase_quantity, demanded_quantity, demanded_date, remark) values
( #{item.id}, #{item.purchasingApplicationId}, #{item.materialId}, #{item.purchaseQuantity}, #{item.demandedQuantity}, #{item.demandedDate}, #{item.remark})
